Class DRDesignCrosstabGroup

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.crosstab.DRDesignCrosstabGroup
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDesignCrosstabGroup, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DRDesignCrosstabColumnGroup, DRDesignCrosstabRowGroup
public abstract class DRDesignCrosstabGroup extends Object implements DRIDesignCrosstabGroup

Abstract DRDesignCrosstabGroup class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
